However, the first four recommendations incorrectly assume this document is a payment receipt when it's clearly a bill/invoice from Maxis Broadband for telecommunications services. Bills naturally wouldn't contain receipt numbers, transaction references, payment methods, or card details as these elements would only appear on documents generated after payment. A more appropriate recommendation would be to submit the actual payment receipt after the bill is paid.
